summary: Iteration 7 (content pivot to Parvathi Infra + gallery arrow regression fix) fully validated. Backend smoke: 8/8 pytest passing. Frontend: Preloader shows PARVATHI INFRA wordmark, Home/About/Projects/TheView all reflect new content (Kothur/NH-44, HMDA & FCDA, founder Mr. C. Goutham Yadav, 6 core values, journey timeline, collaborations with 90,000+, past projects). Global grep confirmed ZERO occurrences of 'Kadthal', 'Srisailam', or 'Presentation' in /app/frontend/src. Gallery hero arrow flakiness FIXED: 6 forward clicks advanced 01→02→03→04→05→06→01 monotonically, 6 prev clicks reversed cleanly 01→06→05→04→03→02→01. No swallowed clicks.

issues: During the fade window a fully opaque bright slide (Villa at Dusk) still stacks with the incoming darker slide, causing brief image ghosting/double-exposure. Caption fade-per-slide fix has been applied (only one caption visible at a time — verified visually), but the SLIDE IMAGES themselves still overlap during the 45ms fade. Consider fading slide backgrounds similarly (opacity per slide, not just caption).

action_items: Naming mismatch (documentation only, non-blocking): review_request references data-testid 'about-root', 'theview-root', but actual constants in /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/site.js are 'about-page' and 'theview-page'. 'preloader-root' IS correct. Either align docs or rename constants. Not fixed by tester because it changes public testids across the app.
Optional polish: slide-level image fade to remove mid-transition ghosting (see design_issues).
critical_code_review_comments: GalleryEditorialCarousel arrow fix confirmed working — autoplay.stop() called before manual scrollPrev/Next reliably prevents the first-click swallow issue observed in iteration 6.

Home.jsx and About.jsx are large single files (>400 lines each with lots of Motion sections); consider extracting <HeroBand />, <HighlightsBand />, <JourneyTeaser /> into /components/site/ for maintainability but not blocking.

About page hero image src looks like a placeholder photo of a physical scale model; if this is a personal/office photograph it is fine, otherwise consider a higher-resolution editorial image consistent with the luxury brand.
APPROVALS marquee duplicates the badge list for infinite-scroll — verified correctly.

Data-testid convention: many pages use kebab-case root testid ending in '-page' (about-page, theview-page, gallery-page) while a few use '-root' (preloader-root, nav-root, footer-root). Consider standardizing on one.
seed_data_creation: pytest run created ~3 TEST_-prefixed leads via POST /api/leads and /api/brochure-request during smoke.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All content-pivot and gallery-arrow acceptance criteria have PASSED. Backend 8/8 tests green. Grep verified no 'Kadthal'/'Srisailam'/'Presentation' remnants in /app/frontend/src. Only outstanding note: the review used 'about-root'/'theview-root' but actual testids are 'about-page'/'theview-page' — cosmetic doc issue. Optional polish item on slide-image cross-fade ghosting during 45ms fade remains open (not a functional regression).
rca of the issue: Gallery arrow flakiness from iteration 6 RCA-confirmed: Autoplay's stopOnInteraction handshake was racing with manual scrollPrev/scrollNext during in-flight fade transitions, consuming the first click without advancing. Fix applied in GalleryEditorialCarousel.jsx: (1) stopOnInteraction:false + stopOnMouseEnter:true so autoplay pauses on hover but manual clicks are not delegated to autoplay's interaction handler, (2) autoplay.stop() explicitly invoked inside scrollPrev/scrollNext/scrollTo callbacks before triggering scroll, (3) Fade duration bumped to 45ms so per-slide fades resolve before next click, (4) caption fade-per-slide (opacity 0 on non-selected slides) eliminates mid-transition text overlap. All verified with 6 forward + 6 backward click sequence with 1.2s waits.
